What You Get

BUILT LIKE A
PRO DESK

Everything a serious trader needs — live data, community, education, and accountability. Zero subscriptions. Zero paywalls. Just results.

01
📡
Real-Time News Feed
Institutional-grade live market news through Financial Juice — the same feed used by professional trading desks. Hits your feed the moment it drops, 24/5. No delay. No noise filter. Just the raw signal.
02
📈
Hourly Futures Prices
NQ, ES, YM, GC, and SI prices posted automatically every hour during market hours. Live intraday data — not stale daily closes. Know where the market is standing before you make a single decision.
03
📅
Daily Economic Calendar
High-impact US economic events — red and orange tier — posted every morning at 8 AM EST. Full week view on demand. Know what's coming before the market does.
04
🧠
Deep Prop Firm Education
Side-by-side breakdowns of every major futures prop firm — pricing tiers, drawdown rules, payout structures, funded trader agreements. All data verified directly from official sources. Updated February 2026.
05
⚔️
Accountability Culture
No signals. No hand-holding. A community that holds you to your plan — journal your trades, track your rules, grow alongside traders who take this seriously. Discipline is enforced here. That's the edge.
06
🏆
Verified Member Wins
Real payouts. Real accounts. Real names. $460,000+ verified directly in-app by our members — no fabricated results, no highlight reels. Proof, not promises.
Prop Firm Education

KNOW BEFORE
YOU BUY

Side-by-side breakdowns of the top futures prop firms — account rules, pricing, drawdown types, payout structures, and profit splits. All data sourced directly from each firm's official website and funded trader agreements. Last verified March 2026.

TOPSTEP
1-Step Evaluation  ·  Monthly Subscription  ·  Est. 2012
EOD Drawdown No DLL (TopstepX) 90/10 Split
Evaluation Pricing — Two Paths
⚙ Standard Path
50K Monthly$49/mo
100K Monthly$99/mo
150K Monthly$149/mo
Activation Fee (on pass)+$149
Lower monthly cost — pay activation only when you pass.
⚡ No Activation Fee Path
50K Monthly$109/mo
100K Monthly$159/mo
150K Monthly$209/mo
Activation Fee$0
Higher monthly but zero fees at funding — better if you pass quickly.
Key Rules
Drawdown Type
EOD Trailing
TopstepX only. Locks at starting balance.
Daily Loss Limit
None
Removed Aug 2024 on TopstepX.
Profit Target
$3K / $6K / $9K
50K / 100K / 150K accounts (6%).
Max Drawdown
$2K / $3K / $4.5K
EOD trailing, locks at starting balance.
Consistency Rule
50% Rule
Best day ≤ 50% of total profit. Eval only.
Min Trading Days
None
No minimum days to pass.
Express Funded Account — Payout Structure (Feb 2026+)
▸Standard XFA: 5 winning days ($150+) → up to $5,000 or 50% of balance
▸Consistency XFA: 3 days with 40% consistency → up to $6,000 or 50% of balance
▸Profit Split: 90/10 (all payouts for traders joined Jan 12, 2026+)
▸Processing: Wise, ACH, Wire/SWIFT — 1–10 business days ($30 fee on ACH/Wire)
▸Profitability Req: Must be profitable since last payout before next request
▸Live Upgrade: Topstep contacts you after consistent XFA success
▸Live Payouts: Daily after 30 winning days; up to 100% of balance
▸Platform: TopstepX only (all new accounts as of Jul 2025)
⚠ Pricing updated Feb 5, 2026. Always verify at help.topstep.com
APEX TRADER FUNDING
1-Step Evaluation  ·  One-Time Fee (30 Days)  ·  Est. 2021  ·  "Apex 4.0" March 2026
EOD + Intraday Options 100% First $25K Up to 20 PAs
Apex 4.0 — Two Drawdown Types (March 2026+)
EOD Evaluations (New)
25K / 50K / 100K / 150KOne-time fee (30 days)
▸Drawdown: EOD trailing — calculated at market close only
▸Has Daily Loss Limit (locks you out for the day, does NOT fail eval)
▸EOD threshold enforced intraday once established — touch = fail
▸No minimum trading days to pass
▸Max 6 payouts per PA, then PA closes
Intraday (Trailing) Evaluations
25K / 50K / 100K / 150KOne-time fee (30 days)
▸Intraday trailing drawdown — follows unrealized P&L in real-time
▸No Daily Loss Limit
▸Threshold locks static once EOD balance exceeds starting + drawdown + $100
▸No minimum trading days to pass
▸Max 6 payouts per PA, then PA closes
⚠ Intraday trailing drawdown follows unrealized P&L tick-by-tick. More aggressive than EOD.
Key Rules (Post-March 1, 2026)
Billing Model
One-Time Fee
30-day access. No monthly rebilling. No resets.
Account Sizes
25K / 50K / 100K / 150K
75K, 250K, 300K discontinued Mar 2026.
Profit Split
100% first $25K → 90/10
Per account. Then 90% trader / 10% firm.
Scaling Rule
Half Contracts Until Buffer
Full size unlocks after EOD balance > start + drawdown + $100.
30% Neg P&L Rule
Per-Trade Limit
Open loss can't exceed 30% of profit balance (PA only).
Max Funded Accounts
20 PAs
Mix of Legacy + EOD + Intraday allowed.
Payout Structure (New Accounts March 2026+)
▸Min Trading Days: 5 days between payouts (down from 8 on legacy)
▸EOD Payout Req: 5 qualifying days with min daily profit by account size
▸Max Payouts: 6 per Performance Account, then PA closes
▸Safety Net: Balance must stay above drawdown + $100 for first 3 payouts
▸No Payout Reviews: Automated processing — no denied payouts, no video reviews
▸Platforms: Tradovate, Rithmic, WealthCharts
▸Legacy Accounts: Pre-March 2026 accounts keep old rules, no retroactive changes
▸Processing: Riseworks (bank transfer, crypto) — typically 24–48 hours
⚠ Apex 4.0 launched March 1, 2026. Legacy accounts unaffected. Verify at support.apextraderfunding.com
LUCID TRADING
Multiple Paths to Funding  ·  One-Time Fee  ·  ~15-Min Payouts  ·  Est. 2025
EOD Drawdown $0 Activation Fee 90/10 Split
Evaluation Paths — One-Time Fee (Feb 2026 Update)
LucidFlex
25K / 50K / 100K / 150KOne-time fee
▸Eval: 50% consistency rule · Min 5 trading days
▸Funded: No consistency rule · No DLL
▸Payout every 5 profitable days
▸6 payouts → LucidLive
LucidPro ⭐ (Upgraded Feb 2026)
25K / 50K / 100K / 150KOne-time fee
▸Can pass in 1 day · No DLL in eval or funded
▸Payout: Every 3 days (fastest eval path)
▸Absorbed best features from discontinued LucidBlack
▸4 payouts → LucidLive
LucidDirect (Skip Eval)
25K / 50K / 150KHigher one-time fee
▸Skip evaluation entirely — funded immediately
▸Funded: 20% consistency rule (strictest)
▸First payout requires 8 trading days
▸First $10K at 100%, then 90/10
All Plans — Shared Rules & LucidLive
▸EOD trailing drawdown — locks at starting balance once hit
▸All positions must close by 4:45 PM EST
▸Min payout: $500 across all plans
▸Payout speed: ~15 minutes average (Plaid ACH / WorkMarket)
▸LucidLive: Real capital, 80/20 split, daily payouts
▸LucidMaxx: Invite-only (Feb 2026) — daily payouts, no caps, no DLL
▸News trading allowed (at your own risk)
▸Inactivity: Account deactivated after 30 days
⚠ LucidBlack discontinued Feb 2026 — features merged into LucidPro. Verify at lucidtrading.com
MYFUNDED FUTURES
1-Step Evaluation  ·  3 Plans (Flex / Pro / Rapid)  ·  $0 Activation Fee  ·  Est. 2023
EOD Drawdown (Flex/Pro) Intraday ⚠ (Rapid) No DLL · $0 Activation
Plans — Monthly Subscription
Flex Plan (Budget / Freedom)
25K~$87/mo
50K~$107/mo
▸Drawdown: EOD trailing · No DLL
▸Split: 80/20 · Payout: 5 winning days ($150+)
▸Max $5,000/payout (25K: $3,000) · $500 net req'd between
▸No consistency rule funded · $0 activation
▸5 payouts OR excess profit → Live account
Pro Plan
50K / 100K / 150K~$227–$477/mo
▸Drawdown: EOD trailing · No scaling rule
▸Split: 80/20 · Payout every 14 calendar days
▸Buffer: $2,100–$4,600 by size · Min $1,000
▸No consistency rule funded · $0 activation
▸3 payouts OR excess profit → Live account
Rapid Plan ⚡
50K / 100K / 150K~$157–$347/mo
▸Intraday trailing drawdown ⚠ in sim funded
▸Split: 90/10 (upgraded Jan 12, 2026)
▸Payout: Daily · $2,100 buffer req'd · $500 min
▸No consistency rule funded · $0 activation
▸Pass eval in 2 days, payout request next day
⚠ Rapid uses intraday trailing in sim funded — highest speed, highest risk.
All Plans — Shared Rules
▸1-step evaluation · 50% consistency rule (eval only)
▸No daily loss limit on any plan
▸Min 2 trading days to pass eval
▸100% of first $10K → then 80/20 (Flex/Pro) or 90/10 (Rapid)
▸$0 activation fee · One-time or monthly depending on plan
▸Max 10 accounts · Activity req: 1 trade/week on sim funded
⚠ Core plan replaced by Flex. Verify at help.myfundedfutures.com
TRADEIFY
3 Paths · Select (New) / Growth / Lightning · $0 Activation · Tradeify Elite Live
EOD Drawdown (All) $0 Activation Fee 90/10 Split
Evaluation Paths (Updated 2026)
Select ⭐ (3-Day Eval — NEW)
50K / 100K / 150KMonthly sub
▸Min 3 days · No DLL in eval · 40% consistency
▸Choose payout after pass: Flex (5-day) or Daily
▸Select Flex: No DLL, 5 winning days/payout, larger caps
▸Select Daily: Has DLL, daily payouts, buffer req'd
▸5 payouts → Tradeify Elite Live
▸$0 activation · sub ends on pass
Growth (1-Day Eval)
50K / 100K / 150KMonthly sub
▸Pass in as little as 1 day
▸Eval: Has DLL · No consistency rule
▸Funded: 35% consistency rule
▸Payout: 5 profitable days · 35% consistency
▸5 payouts → Tradeify Elite Live
Lightning (Instant Funded)
25K / 50K / 100K / 150KOne-time fee
▸Skip evaluation — start earning immediately
▸Consistency: 20% → 25% → 30% (scales up)
▸DLL: Yes · Cannot reset — must re-purchase
▸5 payouts → Tradeify Elite Live
Tradeify Elite Live — Unified Live Program (2026 Update)
▸All plans (Select, Growth, Lightning) feed into Elite Live
▸5 payouts across any account → eligible for Elite
▸Each funded account with a payout becomes its own Elite Live account
▸Up to 5 Live accounts simultaneously
▸Build unlimited sim profits before going live — no cap
▸Multi-account Live scaling · Move live more than once
▸All via NinjaTrader brokerage · EOD drawdown
▸Processing: Rise Pay / Plane — typically 24–48 hours
⚠ Advanced Plan discontinued. Select Plan launched 2026. Verify at help.tradeify.co

FAQ

GOT
QUESTIONS?

Is Market Maulers really free?+
Yes — completely free to join and participate. No subscription, no hidden fees, no credit card required. We believe quality trading education should be accessible to everyone. A premium tier may be introduced in the future, but core access will always remain free.
Do you give financial advice or trade signals?+
No. We are not licensed financial advisors and we do not provide financial advice or trade signals. Everything shared in Market Maulers is for educational and informational purposes only. NFA — Not Financial Advice. Always do your own research before making any trading decision.
I'm a beginner — is this community for me?+
Absolutely. We have members ranging from complete beginners to experienced funded traders. The education library, prop firm guides, and daily content are designed to be accessible at every level. Everyone starts somewhere — we were all beginners once.
What markets does the community focus on?+
Our primary focus is futures trading — NQ, ES, YM, GC, and SI specifically. We also cover prop firm strategies, risk management, trading psychology, and general market education. Members from all backgrounds are welcome regardless of what they trade.
What prop firms do you cover?+
We have full breakdowns and comparisons for Topstep, Lucid, MyFundedFutures, TakeProfitTrader, AlphaFutures, and Tradeify — including drawdown rules, daily loss limits, payout splits, and pricing. All available via bot command inside the server.
How active is the community?+
Very. With 800+ members and automated daily content — news, prices, discipline quotes — there is always something happening. The leadership team is active daily and live trading sessions happen regularly. This is not a dead server with a big member count.
Are the admins actually reachable?+
Yes. Ryan, Frank, and Dillon are active in the server and genuinely reachable. Tag @MaulerAdmin in the help channel and someone will respond. We are not a faceless brand — these are real people who care about the community they built.
How do I get verified after joining?+
After joining the Discord, head to the #verification channel and complete the steps there. Verification unlocks full access to all channels, trading sessions, and community features. If you have trouble, tag @MaulerAdmin and we will sort it out manually.
Will I get spammed if I join?+
No. Automated posts are structured and scheduled — morning news at 8 AM, hourly prices during market hours, and a 7 AM discipline quote on weekdays. No random spam, no excessive pinging, no DM solicitation. We respect your notification settings.
Is this good for entrepreneurship too?+
Yes — the mindset content, discipline vault, and community culture are built around becoming your best self in every area of life. Trading and entrepreneurship share the same foundation: discipline, risk management, and long-term thinking. Many of our members are building businesses alongside their trading journey.
How do I know it's not a scam?+
We never DM members first, never solicit payments, and never sell services privately. The only official admins are AlphaTraderRyan, Frankbearish, and Herm_trades. If anyone DMs you claiming to be from Market Maulers offering a service — it is a scam. Block and report immediately.
What makes this different from other trading Discords?+
Most trading Discords are either dead servers, signal mills, or upsell funnels disguised as communities. Market Maulers is built on genuine care for the people in it — real leadership, real transparency, and a culture where respect is non-negotiable. We give love freely and hold the standard firmly.
About

NOT JUST
A DISCORD

Market Maulers started with a single belief — discipline is the only real edge. Not indicators. Not signals. Not the next hot strategy. Discipline. We built this for the traders who show up every day even when it's hard.

We are not a signal service. We are not selling a course. We are real people on the same journey as you — sharing what we learn, openly and without pretense. The moment you join, you are family.

Beyond community, we built your daily trading headquarters — live market status, futures prices, economic calendar, prop firm comparisons, and Fear & Greed data. Everything you need, no subscriptions.

⚔️Discipline First
🌱Genuine Growth
🤝Real Community
🙏Built on Faith
"I started Market Maulers because I was tired of communities that treated people like customers. I wanted something real — a place where serious people show up, do the work, and push each other forward without pretense. I am not here because I have it all figured out. I am here because I am on the same journey as every person in this server, and I believe that when you surround yourself with the right people, the ceiling disappears. This community is built on discipline, faith, and a standard that does not bend — and that is exactly what we will become known for."
— Ryan DiNocco · Founder, AlphaTraderRyan  @Ryan0513549 ↗
"I partnered with Ryan and Frank because they carry the same principles I was raised with — discipline, grit, and long-term vision. Growing up in a family pumpkin patch business taught me that relationships are everything. In blackjack, you don't win just because you're dealt a good hand — you win because you know how to play it. With these guys, it felt like sitting down with a pair of aces and playing it the right way."
— Dillon Herrmann · Owner  @PatchPlays_ ↗
"Ryan and I met in a Discord server and after seeing how much we had in common, we knew this was what we were meant to build. We want to create an empire in the trading space — and Market Maulers is the foundation. They say 90–95% of traders fail. At Market Maulers, we believe we can cut that number in half."
— Frank · Founder, Frankbearish  @frankbearish_ ↗

TRADING PSYCHOLOGY

THE MAULER
MINDSET

Charts don't blow accounts — emotions do. The edge isn't in your strategy. It's in your ability to execute it when every instinct says don't. This is the mental game.

⚔️ THE CODE
I do not chase. I do not revenge trade. I do not move my stop.
I accept the loss before I enter. I size for survival, not ego.
I follow the plan — even when it's boring, even when I'm wrong.
Green days are earned. Red days are tuition.
I am not my P&L. I am my process.
THE TRAPS
🔥 Revenge Trading
WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE
You just took a loss. Instead of stepping away, you immediately re-enter — bigger size, worse setup, pure emotion. You're not trading the chart anymore. You're trading your ego.
THE FIX
Walk away for 15 minutes. No screens. When you come back, ask: "Would I take this trade if I were flat today?" If no — don't take it.
👀 FOMO Entries
WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE
NQ just ripped 50 points and you weren't in it. So you chase. You enter late, at a terrible price, with no edge. The move is already done — you're just the last one in.
THE FIX
Missed moves are not lost money. They're trades you were never in. Wait for the pullback. Wait for your level. The market runs every single day.
🎰 Overtrading After a Win
WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE
You're up $800 on the day. Feeling invincible. So you take 6 more trades you wouldn't normally take — and give it all back plus some. The "house money" effect is real and it will destroy you.
THE FIX
Set a daily trade limit. Hit your target? Shut it down. Protect the green. A $400 green day is worth more than a $800-turned-$200 day. Every time.
🚫 Moving Your Stop Loss
WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE
Price is coming to your stop. You know you should let it hit. But you widen it — just a little. Then a little more. Now you're in a max loss situation that was completely avoidable.
THE FIX
Your stop was right when you placed it. Trust pre-trade you — that version was thinking clearly. In-trade you is compromised. The stop is the plan. Honor it.
PRE-SESSION CHECKLIST
Before you open your platform, run through these. Click each one when ready.
✓
Did I sleep enough? Am I mentally sharp?
✓
Have I reviewed my levels and bias for today?
✓
Am I sized correctly for my account and rules?
✓
Have I accepted that I could lose on every trade today?
✓
Am I carrying anger or frustration from yesterday?
✓
Do I have a max loss number I will honor — no exceptions?
✓
Am I trading to make money — or to feel something?
END-OF-DAY JOURNAL
Every session ends with honest answers. Not what you wish happened — what actually happened.
01
What was my plan today? Did I follow it?
02
What emotion showed up strongest today?
03
Would I take every trade again knowing the outcome?
04
What's one thing I'll do differently tomorrow?

— MARK DOUGLAS · TRADING IN THE ZONE
